reviews.title: Nice resort, but not a good choice for young children.
reviews.positives: Staff was very friendly and helpful.
reviews.negatives: While the resort is mostly very nice, the facilities for young children are embarrassingly poor in comparison. The Kids’s Club has barely any toys to engage kids, and those they do have are old and missing lots of components, making some toys unusable. Also, while they offered one complimentary kid’s activity on most days, the ones that our child excitedly participated in lasted no more than 20 minutes.

reviews.title: ベッドの清掃が悪いです。。
reviews.text:
4年前に続いて２度目の滞在でした。２年くらい前に経営がヴィンパールからマリオットに変わったようで、ホテル名もヴィンパールラグジュアリーから変わっていました。
今回も３ベッドルーム オーシャンビューヴィラに家族３人で３泊滞在しました。
スタッフのサービスや部屋の備品や清掃は、ヴィンパールラグジュアリー時代の方がはるかに良かったです。
以前は各寝室にビーチサンダルが備えてありましたが、今回はありませんでした。
部屋の清掃も、グラスが欠けているのにそのまま洗われてしまってありました。
また、4ベッドルームヴィラらアップグレードしてくれましたが、海は多少見える程度でした。

今回の滞在で何よりも残念だったのは、あまり使われていない寝室なのか? １泊目に妻が寝たベッドで妻が３ヶ所ほどダニに食われました。
２泊目からは別の寝室に変えたので更なる被害はありませんでしたが、ダナンからホーチミンに移動してさらに３泊ベトナムに居りましたが、妻はベトナム滞在中ずっと痒みが収まりませんでした。
ベッドの清掃を徹底的に改善すべきです。

reviews.title: Frankly not worth
reviews.text:
I made a booking for 3 people that include my 18 years son.
The surprise was they charged 1 Million vnd for a bed for my son. They think king size bed can accommodate 3 people. 
This is international hotel, think about built size of other nation is far bigger than Vietnam. 
Anyhow, I did not like the check in process, I had to wait a lot..
The cleanliness is not as per Marriot standards. 
The hotel seems to be old, the hotel is not nicely decorated as per being Marriot. 
I stayed also stayed in Stella Maris danang where it was far better in service.  It was missing a big pool.
reviews.response:
Dear Sharad,

Warmest greetings from Danang Marriott Resort & Spa.

I am writing to express my sincerest apologies for the inconvenience you experienced during your recent stay at our hotel. After carefully reviewing your review, I am deeply sorry for the discomfort and dissatisfaction caused by the service experience, room arrangements, and overall facilities during your visit.

I want to assure you that we take these matters seriously, and we have already taken steps to address the issues you encountered. We are committed to avoiding such situations in the future and ensuring that all our guests receive the highest level of service and care.

Once again, I offer my deepest apologies for the inconveniences you encountered during your stay. We hope that you will reconsider and give us another opportunity to provide you with the exceptional service and experience that we strive to deliver.

I hope we can restore your faith in our hotel. Thank you so much.

Best regards,
Danang Marriott

During check-in, I couldn't use my American Express card (apparently because it was a bank holiday), so I had to use my Chinese debit card. reviews.title: Agoda reservation
reviews.text:
I searched on the Agoda site and made a reservation for 4 nights because of the promotion for the Spa Treatment 60 minutes. When I set it for 1 night, it said "Spa Treatment 60 minutes one-time," so I booked 4 nights. When I arrived at the Marriott and tried to make a spa reservation, they told me it could only be done once. So I contacted Agoda, and the representative said, "Isn't it written as one-time?" They insisted that it clearly states one-time and that it's my fault for not seeing it, and that they are not at fault. Look here, representative, I called because I wanted help finding a solution after paying a high phone fee, but if you're just going to talk about the confirmation document, I wouldn’t have called. 

Then you should clearly state from the beginning that it is not a consecutive night promotion. Can't you write that in a visible way? One night is one-time, four nights are one-time, and ten nights are one-time; then it’s not a promotion. If it's one-time for one night, then it should be a one-night promotion and only charge for one night. Don't charge the same rate for four nights. Shouldn’t the pricing for consecutive nights be different when it’s a one-time promotion? I hope you will take this seriously and address it accurately. 

Since we don't have anything else to do here, I will leave this message. The accommodation is good; I trust Agoda and use it several times a year, but because of the staff, I'm losing trust.

reviews.title: Decent stay but could be improved
reviews.text:
Certainly! Here's a polished version of your hotel review based on the details you provided:

---

**Decent Stay, but Could Be Improved**

Our recent stay at this villa was okay, but it didn’t quite meet our expectations for an exceptional experience. The villa itself is spacious, resembling a large house with three rooms. We stayed in one of the rooms with my wife and our two kids (a 1-year-old baby and a 4-year-old). While the space was adequate, there were a few inconveniences that affected our stay.

One of the main issues was the layout. To access basic necessities, like preparing milk for the baby, we had to walk to the kitchen, which was a bit inconvenient, especially with young children. Additionally, the room we stayed in had a corridor with a window opening for natural lighting, but it lacked blinds or curtains. This became a problem for us because our kids are sensitive to light, and they woke up early as soon as the sun rose. The other two rooms didn’t have this issue, as they didn’t have the same natural light opening.

On the positive side, the breakfast buffet was fantastic. There was a wide variety of food options, and we thoroughly enjoyed it every morning. The hotel also has some great facilities for families, including a kid’s club and a playground, which were a hit with our 4-year-old.

Overall, the villa feels a bit dated, though it’s maintained at a fair level. While it has its strengths, there are areas that could be improved to make the stay more comfortable, especially for families with young children. We had a decent experience, but it wasn’t anything extraordinary.
reviews.response:
Dear Wai,

Thank you so much for staying and leave us a review.

On behalf of the brilliant team, we would like to thank you once again for choosing our resort to stay and we really appreciate your comment for us as well. 

Your comment regarding the facilities in the room have been shared with our management board for further improvement. 

We hope to welcome you back soon.

Thank you and best regards,

Danang Marriott Resort & Spa Team

reviews.title: Good Food and relaxation experience
reviews.text:
Overall we had a good experience. The top for us would be the food.
We tried the Marriot burger, seafood risotto, carbonara, vietnamese spring rolls and squid ink pasta. All of these foods mentioned were great and exceptional.  A must mention would be the goji butter and complimentary buns at the Goji restaurant. we forgot to ask for her name, our waitress was really observant and attentive as well. The coconut coffee that she recommended us was really good.
The beach and pool were really nice as well, overall great view and really clean.
The coffee workshop was a great idea to have tourist understand more about vietnamese culture.
The seafood platter, we had at Nuo Nuoc bar. I dare say that it is much better to have it at the hotel then at the night markets, because the price might be similar but you have greater service and environement.
Everything was great overall, just that we had a problem with the air conditioning during midnight (maybe it was because of the heavy rain), which was fixed early morning when maintence staff came.

reviews.text:
I like Vinpearl everywhere in Vietnam. Vinpearl is always my preference for hotel wherever I go. However, I realize that Vinpearl Da Nang quality is going down compare to few years ago in some extent:
1. Lot of mosquito in the room
2. All the windows could be in better design for better view especially the beach front room. The current windows frame looks horrible which block the beach/ocean view.
3. Some type of plant/flower can be plant in front of the balcony to scare the mosquito away and make the balcony looks more romantic.
4. Rooms service is going down, they did not pay attention on a lot of broken item in the room, need to call and report at least three broken items.

Breakfast quality is going up though.

Overall, I have a good time.

reviews.title: Wonderful Relaxing Days at a very well Maintained Resort

The cleanliness and the quality of the facilities are truly exceptional.
The breakfast is highly recommendable. Good quality food and overwhelming choice. The best breakfast I had in Vietnam so far.
Immaculately tended gardens and pools.
The staff were very well trained and extremely friendly and motivated.
The beach is wonderful. Clean water, fine sand.
reviews.negatives: The food choice in the evening is a bit limited. There is not much around the hotel but Danang city is only a short 15 minute taxi ride away.

reviews.title: Just Satisfied
reviews.text:
Beautiful resort with nice white sand, clean beach.  The room is clean and spacious.  Bath tub needs to be cleaner but the rest of the bathroom is well kept.   Breakfast overall is good however; the noodle soup (chicken/beef) should be change with different selections daily.  By the 3rd day, the same type food served looks less appealing to me.   We had buffet dinner one night, that Was a big disappointment, the food choices were poor and they tasted unpleasant..  The pools are nice but too many children with blown up animal floaters which caused trouble for adults  to swim not without bumping in to those floaters..  The hotel should have a designated pool specifically for children to play with floaters
Overall, we enjoyed the facility and satisfied enough.

the hotel is new and spacious. the beach is nice and on a good location for holiday, not so much for business as it is further away from town compared to other resorts. however for the price the rooms and facilities of the hotels are just so so. i expected something special but it was a disappointment. i stayed at other similar resorts before. i can't really get the theme for this hotel. not really for couples wo wanted quiet corners for themselves, more suitable for families. having said that the facilities are not enticing enough for the kids.  i think this is going to be a major problem for them. apart from the many pools they have, not much of other facilities. and the pool are designed more for adults than kids as there aren't any slides, etc or more children friendly section. so you can't compare with other family resorts.

don't get me wrong, the hotel is still good for many travelers as the service, cleanliness and room comfort is there. just that i have been a frequent traveler either for business or family vacation. for the price my wife and i paid for a suite, it just fall short of the standards compared to other hotels or similar type. luckily my kids didn't join us for this trip. otherwise it will be a disappointment for them as well.

the staff are extremely friendly. nevertheless they are not well trained as what you would expect for a 5 star hotel.

reviews.title: Mixing Moments of Bliss with Areas for Improvement
reviews.text:
Our recent stay at Marriott Danang was a blend of positives and negatives, offering moments of delight alongside areas for improvement.

On the positive side, Trang assisted us during the booking process, ensuring our peace of mind by accommodating our requests for a baby cot and a quiet room with a pleasant ocean view. Despite the resort's policy of not providing baby cots for children over one year old, Trang managed to arrange one for us, although it was smaller than expected. It was perplexing for a five-star resort not to cater to the needs of slightly older infants, especially considering the resort's clear emphasis on being family-friendly, with both indoor and outdoor playgrounds that our child adored. The staff's sweetness and warm greetings further enhanced our experience, and the thoughtful gift of a bee backpack filled with a yellow dragonfly and coloring book made our child's stay truly memorable. Additionally, we appreciated the efforts of the staff who went above and beyond to locate a baby tub for our kid, demonstrating their dedication to guest satisfaction.

The resort itself was expansive and beautiful, with a stunning white sand beach. However, the rough sea prevented swimming. Additionally, the rooms seemed outdated, likely inherited from the previous Vinpearl property, with Marriott taking over but retaining the older buildings and facilities. Despite requesting housekeeping to replenish the towers in all four towers, they consistently left only two, requiring daily requests for additional towels—an annoyance that detracted from the overall experience.

The beach bar could benefit from a wider selection of food options.

In conclusion, our stay at Marriott Danang had its highlights, including exceptional staff service and family-friendly amenities.
reviews.response:
Dear Diu,
Warmest greetings from Danang Marriott Resort & Spa.
I am writing to express my sincerest apologies for the inconvenience you experienced during your recent stay at our hotel. After carefully reviewing your review, I am deeply sorry for the baby cot policy, outdated rooms problem, the towel shortage issues and the limited food options at beach bar.
I want to assure you that we take these matters seriously, and we have already taken steps to address the issues you encountered. We are committed to avoiding such situations in the future and ensuring that all our guests receive the highest level of service and care.
Once again, I offer my deepest apologies for the inconveniences you encountered during your stay. We hope that you will reconsider and give us another opportunity to provide you with the exceptional service and experience that we strive to deliver. 
I hope we can restore your faith in our hotel. Thank you so much.
Best regards,
Piotr Madej
General Manager

reviews.title: A well kept nice resort with excellent staff but..
reviews.text:
We experienced exceptional staff from start to finish, competent and always very friendly. Resort and rooms are fantastic and well worth the money. Breakfast was very nice. On the downside: The European restaurant for dinner. Overpriced and just not nice. Likewise beverages in the restaurants. 10x high street prices for beer and soft drinks and easily 4-5x outside restaurants of a similar standard. Very nice spa area but again overpriced by about factor 2. So not surprisingly, neither the Spa nor the restaurants/bars are frequented much.
The location is excellent for beach and Golf but a bit far out from Da Nang and Hoi An and literally nothing to do around the hotel other than the Marble Mountains which are nice. On the upside, they have a shuttle service to Hoi An which is good but needs to be prebooked. Otherwise a taxi ride is required.
We had two unhappier moments but the way how staff and management handled them were exemplary. Sometimes things just happen and when a hotel deals with matters that well, they are easily put away.
The Vinpearl is en route to being one of the great hotels in Da Nang with little improvements here and there. Would we go again or recommend it? Yes, in particular if you are into Golf and love quiet and beautifully laid out resorts along endless stretches of powdered white natural beach. Look at weather charts for temperatures though :-)

reviews.title: Pleasant hotel stay in wintry weather
reviews.text: Weather was chilly and there were few guests during the month of December. The lovely pools were not utilised and the clean stretch of beach with strong waves was empty, save for a parent and child spotted playing beach volleyball one morning. The Hotel was dressed up for Christmas, serving staff were wearing Xmas hats, and staff gathered to practise their carols. Although most staff were not fluent in English, they did their best to communicate clearly and kept smiling. It was a pleasant surprise to find out how the Hotel utilised technology - tap card room entry, complimentary wireless keyboard and using the TV screen, aircon lights and curtains controlled by touchscreen, etc. Each day, an animal fashioned out of small towels is placed on the bed, a cute touch. All 3 meals were provided for, making it difficult to shed any extra weight.  Any dietary requirements were also taken into consideration.  Dinner times were extra nice with Filipino musicians and singers providing live entertainment, even with song requests. There is even a Kids Club and a Spa.
reviews.positives: Walking distance to the Marble Mountain, high-tech room facilities, nice environment, lovely swimming pools, clean beach, friendly staff, live music during dinner.

reviews.title: Ein Traum von einem Hotel!
reviews.positives:
Das Danang Marriott ist eines der besten Hotels, in denen ich je war. Der Baustil hat mir gefallen und ich habe jeden Tag gedacht: Oh wie schön. Die parkartige Gartenanlage ist liebevoll gepflegt, überall gibt es Blumen und Palmen und sattes Grün. 
Die Lage direkt am Strand ist wunderschön und in Danang eher die Ausnahme. 
Die Brandung ist recht stark und das Meer deutlich hörbar, zumindest im Februar. Für Tinnitus-Patienten wie mich eine willkommene Erlösung von meinen Ohrgeräuschen. Der Strand ist breit und waagrecht, so dass man ewig daran entlang laufen kann, wenn man will. 
Das Personal ist wunderbar: An der Rezeption, am Frühstücksbüffet, im Restaurant, beim Wäscheservice, beim Zimmerservice. Alle Frauen und Männer waren stets hilfsbereit und freundlich und gaben mir das Gefühl, sie arbeiten gerne dort. 
Normalerweise frühstücke ich nie, aber das frische und vielfältige Angebot im Marriott hat mich dazu verführt, meine Gewohnheit zu ändern. Es gibt jeden Tag Neues zu entdecken, es ist für jeden etwas dabei und man kann draußen sitzen! 
Der große Pool ist traumhaft. Seine Schwimmtiefe ist durchgehend 1,55 Meter; kleine Kinder haben eigene Becken. Das Wasser ist frisch und morgens angenehm kühl. In einem zweiten großen Pool ziehen sportliche Schwimmer ihre Bahnen, die Schwimmtiefe dort ist 1,45 Meter. 
Generell stellt man sich in ganz Vietnam nicht so an, was das Rauchen angeht. Und so gibt es auch im Marriott zwei würdige Außenbereiche, in denen man zu einem Getränk seiner Wahl eine Zigarette genießen kann. Auf den Balkonen darf ebenfalls geraucht werden. Es gibt zwei bequeme Sessel und einen Tisch, was besonders hervorzuheben ist, da geräumige und schön gestaltete Balkone mit gemütlichen Balkonmöbeln wie im Marriott längst keine Selbstverständlichkeit mehr sind.
reviews.negatives: Ich habe nur eine Anregung, nämlich den grässlichen Teppich zu entfernen, der unter dem Bett ausgelegt ist. Er verdeckt einen gepflegten weichen Holzboden, der in einem tropischen Land viel angenehmer zu betreten wäre als ein konstant fusselnder Teppich von minderer Qualität. Der Zimmerservice gibt sich wirklich jede Mühe, all die Fusseln und Wollmäuse, die der Teppich täglich hergibt, zu entfernen, aber schon nach kurzer Zeit ist alles wieder da.

reviews.title: Great, relaxing family holiday.
reviews.text:

The breakfast menu was somewhat limited but good enough. 
The rooms were clean and the staff friendly.

Das gesamte Personal war sehr freundlich und zuvorkommend, vor allem das Personal und der Barkeeper Trinh an der Strandbar.
Wir werden auf jeden Fall wieder kommen !

reviews.text:
It was excellent resort. 
Good conditions room and swimming pool, and nice beach..
But not kind staff in swimming pool..
When I requested 2 towels per 1 person, but they refused my request without explanation.
If that is their rules, I am ok.. But, many customers could use many towels... only we could not use other towel except 1 towel per 1 person.
That is unfair.. 
And I requested 2 more teethbursh, they said it is ok.. But they didn't take it to me...
They need improvement of service..

reviews.text: This hotel is a great place to spend a few days of R&R. All food was provided, rooms were very comfortable and well appointed. The pools and garden area are well maintained, which makes for a wonderful place to sit and watch time pass as the children play. very relaxing.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Totally relaxing
reviews.text: We arrived just prior to a typhoon, but the staff fully prepared the hotel and grounds for it. The typhoon hit us around 1am on Tuesday morning, and by Wednesday, we were back out in the pool - apart from a few stripped trees, you wouldn't even know a typhoon had hit us. Loved my stay here, but the menu choices got a bit boring by the end of our 5 night stay.
reviews.positives: The room, the view and the pool and beach

reviews.title: wunderbares Hotel sehr zu empfehlen 👍🏾
reviews.positives:
ein ganz herrlicher großer Garten (mit einem wunderschönen kleinen Nutzgarten, den man anschauen kann) traumhaft am Strand gelegen. Das Personal ist ausnehmend freundlich und wir hatten nie das Gefühl, dass es zu voll wird. Im Ressort hat man seine Ruhe und ist trotzdem in 20 Minuten mitten im Trubel in DaNang. große Weiterempfehlung!
Außerdem hatte ich eine 90-minütiges Spamassage, und meine Therapeutin war hervorragend. Mein Sohn buchte 30 Minuten und war ebenfalls begeistert.
reviews.negatives:
Das Frühstücksbuffet war wirklich fürchterlich. Wie in einer riesigen Bahnhofshalle, Lautstärke unerträglich. 
Wir haben Gott sei Dank die Möglichkeit gehabt, uns nach draußen zu setzen dort war es herrlich ruhig mit einem fantastischen Blick auf den Garten und das Meer. deswegen war es wieder in Ordnung. Hätte ich drinnen sitzen müssen wär ich glaube ich verrückt geworden oder wäre nie frühstücken gegangen.

reviews.title: Luxury in Da Nang

reviews.title: Perfekt, Herausragend!
reviews.positives: Wunderschönes Resort, traumhafte Villa mit außerordentlichem Luxus in Größe und Ausstattung. Fantastisches Frühstücks Buffet, super freundlicher Service in allen Bereichen (inklusive SPA Bereich) , sehr gutes Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis. Schöne Ausflugs- und Sightseeing-Ziele in der Umgebung.
reviews.negatives: In der Küche der Villa wäre Besteck wünschenswert. Es gab Teller Tassen Töpfe, aber eben kein Besteck. Nicht, dass man dort unbedingt selbst kochen möchte, weil das Frühstück und die Restaurants excellent sind, aber um mal einen Kaffee umzurühren oder Obst zu schneiden, wäre eine Grundausstattung mit Bestecken vorteilhaft.

reviews.title: Great hospitality! Food is poor though.
reviews.text:
located in one of the best beach in da nang. 
blue ocean, white sand, cool wind makes it the real feeling of 5 star resort.

there are 2 great things about this resort. 
1 is hospitality. friendly staff. great service mindset. especially staff in restaurants.
2 is luxury equipments. room is full with everything needed. restaurant is more than beautiful.

only not so good thing is food. seafood pizza from room service is bad. food served in restaurants is ok, but not good enough comparing to its price and the level of this resort.

above all, great hospitality made our trip special, so thank you vinpearl luxury danang!
reviews.positives: Hospitality, location

reviews.negatives:

Ja, das ist Jammern auf hohem Niveau, kann aber von einem 5* Haus erwartet werden

Some things to improve, a better Kids Pool Structure, the square pool just does not cut it. Better Entertainment options for kids & adults as there were hardly any except a trio group singing at the bar on saturday night but ended briefly by 10pm. Great Resort but Boring after 2 nights honestly.

Big rooms with ante rooms, balconies and a huge bathroom is always a plus. Wifi slowed down when more guests arrived but not a deal breaker as we were out quite a bit.

reviews.title: 4night stay
reviews.text:
The moment we arrived at the resort, we were greeted with friendly staff of vinpearl. 
We were amazed by the hospitality of the staff. 
this is the first time we are spending our wedding anniversary at vinpearl resort danang n we fell in love w the pools n beach. 
It was an amazing n relaxing 5 days well spent. 
The only disappointment is that the resort in room dining does not have much choices and that Housekeeping only burnt 1 night of essential oil instead of the 4 nights. If this service is routinely burnt for 4 nights, it will further delight the guests. 
As marble mountain is only 8 mins walk away, we spent a good 4 hours climbing n exploring the caves. 
However, there isn't any nearby restaurants except for la Luna which is near marble mountain or you have to take a taxi to lam viet. 
We also took the shuttle ($100k dong) to Hanoi. A worthwhile trip! Many things to look around. Bought a few leather products and the famous ban my (sandwhich) there. U can spent up to half a day there shopping and relaxing. 
Overall stay was good. But you have to travel out by taxi to find food if you dun wish to dine in the resort.

reviews.title: Honest Review of Danang Marriott Resort & Spa (from a Korean traveler’s perspective)
reviews.text:
The location is excellent. Being right in front of Non Nuoc Beach makes it easy to enjoy the ocean, and the overall resort atmosphere feels very relaxing. However, the price is definitely on the higher side. At a similar budget, you could consider some private villas in Da Nang, although of course you wouldn’t get a Marriott-level property for that price.

I did experience a small issue during check-in, but the overall manager, ANNA, handled it very professionally. Even though it was a very busy time, she helped resolve the situation smoothly, which honestly left a strong impression.

The resort itself is huge, and the food quality was surprisingly good overall. One downside was that food orders at the pool close around 7 PM and the bar shuts down around 7:30 PM, which felt a bit too early for a resort like this. Still, the food and drinks were tasty.

The swimming pool is massive, and having the beach right in front of it makes the atmosphere even better. One thing to note: the buildings are not very tall, so if you stay on the 2nd or 3rd floor, coconut trees may block part of the ocean view even if your room is labeled “ocean view.” Just something to keep in mind.

That said, being a Marriott property is definitely a big advantage. The overall food, service, and hospitality quality feel consistently well-managed. The room itself was spacious, and I really liked the large bathroom. The high ceiling made the room feel even more open and comfortable, and the view was beautiful as well.

Overall, it’s a solid resort with strong service standards, great beach access, and a relaxing atmosphere — just be aware of the pricing level and early closing times for some facilities.

reviews.title: A place I want to visit again later.
reviews.text:
It seems that the name has changed from the old Vinpearl. The famous lodging conditions were good, and I had a very nice and special experience because they upgraded me to a villa. I stayed for 2 nights, and breakfast was included. Although it was a garden view, I could see the sea far away, which was nice, and being in a villa made it very private, which I loved. On the last day, I wanted to use the microwave and induction stove, but when I checked, everything was turned off, so I wondered if it was unavailable. I called to inquire, and they repeatedly apologized, saying they would provide better service next time, which showed their kindness and commitment to service. The entire staff was like that. They greeted us every time we passed by, and I truly recommend this place for families or couples to relax. 

The location is a bit far from the city, so it seems like Grab rides can add up, but if you plan your routes well, it’s not bad. There is a private beach right in front, and there is a nice walking path. The private pool had very clean water and was in excellent condition. The public pool had a lot of sand on the floor, and while the water was very warm, it didn’t seem very clean since it is a shared space. However, the view is great, the pool is huge, and surprisingly not too deep, so I had a lot of fun without needing a tube or life jacket. There are many photo spots everywhere, and no matter where you take a picture, the scenery is breathtaking.

Although the breakfast menu wasn't very extensive, it included pho, curry, garlic fried rice, bibimbap, kimbap, banh mi, bakery items, coconut coffee, fried noodles, hash browns, and dumplings, all of which were delicious! The ingredients were fresh, and the banh mi was so good that I had it twice. The coffee, both Americano and coconut coffee, was tasty too. The bread was really... everything was delicious. I don’t usually like desserts, but they were really good. If I get a chance to go again, I think it would be really fun to use the pool villa with a group and even have dinner or a barbecue party, making it feel like paradise! And even though the villa was a bit far from the lobby, they would take us there quickly, allowing us to enjoy our time comfortably.

reviews.title: Exquisite hotel,inadequate treatment of customers
reviews.text:
Very new hotel, has a very fresh and clean ambiance.
The ocean panoramic view room has huge wall size windows so that the first thing you can see when you open your eyes in the morning is the ocean.
The bathroom is huge with a bath tub located by the wall-size windows, with one overlooking the hotel grounds and the other one with an ocean view. Exquisite experience, especially at night.
The hotel is located away from the noise of the city which is perfect if what you want is to switch off for a few days. 
What spoiled the whole experience for me though unfortunately, was that during the three days I was staying there, there was constant banging of hammers and noise of electric drills in the neighbouring rooms due to some redecorations or repairs. The works surprisingly started at seven AM and lasted the whole day. 
The hotel itself is very nice but one of the reasons I chose it was for being supposedly a quiet place to relax and get a lot of sleep after an extremely hectic year at work and the one thing I wanted I did not get – no piece, no quiet, no rest.
reviews.positives: The ocean view room, panoramic view from the bath tub, swimming pools

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: 수영장이 좋았습니다. 룸도 넓어서 좋았는데, 조식도 꽤 괜찮게 나와서 먹을만했어요. 쌀국수도 조식에서 나오는데 맛있더라구요. 보편적으로 대부분 잘 해주시기는 했는데, 수저나 그릇 요청같은.. 가져다 달라는 요청을 빨리 해주지는 않아서 중간에 한번 더 요청해야할 것 같아요.
reviews.negatives:
시내의 스파를 이용하지 못할 것 같아서 호텔 스파를 방문하기 2주 전에 미리 예약하고 확인서까지 받고 갔습니다. 하지만 직원 실수로 예약자로 올라가 있지 않았더라구요. 여기까지는 그럴 수 있다 싶었는데... 대안이라고 제시한 것들이 본인들 실수로 불편함을 느끼는 고객을 대한다는 생각이 들지 않게 했습니다. 본래 예약이 6시 반 2명인데도 불구하고, 8시/8시 반 각각 한명씩 들어가던가 7시 반에 있는 2명 예약 고객이 노쇼하는 경우 연락 줄테니 하겠냐는 것 뿐이였습니다. 최선을 다해서 알아보려고 하는 게 아니라 예약 없이 온 사람을 대하는 것 같아서 따지고 안하겠다고 하고 룸으로 돌아가니 전화로 다시 2명 동시 해주겠다고 이야기 하는데....
영어로 열심히 따지고 불쾌하다고 하지 않았더라면, 전화로 제가 원하는 사항을 해주겠다고 했을지 의문이더라구요. 결론을 말하자면 안했습니다.
여기 가시는 분들은 스파는 다시 고려해보시는 걸 추천드려요! 차라리 시내에서 하고 들어오세요! 깔끔한데도 좀 많이 있던데 그런데 가셔도 좋을 것 같아요. 저 같은 경우가 생기지 않으리라는 보장이 없는 곳이라 이렇게 길게 적습니다 :)

reviews.title: High expectations that were exceeded
reviews.text:
It ticked our boxes of relaxing, deluxe,great pools, established gardens, quiet yet convenient. Will stay again 100%. 

The room was massive, great view, everything you need and so much more. 
Staff are so happy. Friendly, helpful and a little sad to leave. Sunny in the writers bar is ever so friendly and will do anything to make your visit perfect. The restaurant staff and managers bent over backwards when my partner was laid up with a stomach bug for the day and didnt make it to breakfast. I went to the clinic and they delivered some food for his breakfast. They continued to check in every day after!  Reception- phone is answered first ring and so accommodating.
Other guests, yes mostly South Korean but friendly quiet and we had plenty of time  where we had a pool or corner of a restaurant to ourselves. 
The food was delicious. Props to the pastry chef, your skills are amazing!
Location will be perfect when strip is built up somemore. I'm sadly out of room.

reviews.title: Excellent beach resort in DaNang!
reviews.text:
My sister and I stayed here for about a week on our first trip to Vietnam. We had a wonderful vacation. The Vinpearl is a beautiful property. The pool area facing the sea is absolutely gorgeous. We arrived late in the evening and when we awoke, we were blown away by our sea views (panormic view rooms). The resort never felt crowded and there were very few young children (a bonus in my opinion). 

The resort offers free shuttle service to Hoi An, which is very convenient, but must be booked with the front desk at least 1 day in advance. We booked tours to Cham Island and Bana Hills through the hotel, which were very nice and included private car and private English speaking tour guides.

I have recommended Danang and the Vinpearl resort to many friends since staying here. 

My only reservation would be regarding full board, which we booked. The food could be improved upon. The breakfast buffet is great and everything you would expect in Asian resort like this, but I felt that dinner could have been a bit nicer.
reviews.positives: location, pool/beach, ease of booking tours

reviews.title: Pristine white sandy beach front resort
reviews.text: A perfect resort to unwind and just relax and enjoy the surroundings or a great loa action to explore some of vietnams highlights or be as active or lazy as you like. Our panoramic view room was huge with a divinely comfortable bed. The bathroom was as big as most hotel bedrooms with a deep bath and large separate shower. The coffe. Machine was a delight and we had a great view of the sandy beach and numerous pools. We had all you could eat buffet 3 meals a day. A lot of children there during our stay made the main dining room noisy but management set up another buffet in the oroental room which was child free- that was a great move as it was. Child free and so relaxing. Plenty of food to choose from- probably too much really especially if you love seafood. If not you can ask for something else( I didn't know this until last day as they don't advertise it) lovely Vietnamese restaurants in nearby Hoi An  All staff went out of their way to help- nothing was too much trouble. Sometimes you had to ask and that could be funny in interpreting our requests by some staff. Staff on the front line spoke perfect English though- puts we Aussies to shame. Would definitely go again.
reviews.positives: 5 star resort where facilities are first class

reviews.negatives: Checkin quá chậm, chờ lâu hơn 1 tiếng sau giờ checkin quy định nhưng nv checkin k hề chủ động liên hệ khách để nhận phòng. Ăn buffe sáng k đủ bàn phải chờ 45p mới đến lượt được ăn. Chất lượng phục vụ quá tệ so với chi phí khách bỏ ra

I just wish that when I had booked the rooms, the price was all-in including the 3rd bed as it usually is. I don't like being surprised with additional payments upon check-in and its too late to change our minds.

reviews.title: It was the best.
reviews.text:
I stayed with my wife and daughter (3 years old) for three nights, and everything about the location, facilities, and service was flawless, allowing us to have a luxurious and enjoyable time.

<Location>
It was about a 15 to 20-minute drive from the airport and the city. (As long as you can use Grab, I think moving around Da Nang will not be a problem.) There is nothing around except for the Marble Mountains, but it is far from the hustle and bustle of the city center, allowing for a tranquil experience.

You can access the beach directly from the hotel (while it's not a private beach, it had a very calm atmosphere).

<Facilities>
The room was impeccably clean. The cleaning was thorough down to the smallest details. The wooden furniture created a serene atmosphere, and the bathroom was spacious enough to comfortably bathe with our child.

The pool was very large, and there were plenty of umbrellas and lounge chairs by the poolside (although there were no water slides or similar attractions that children usually prefer).

At night, I noticed insects and geckos gathering in the bright hallways and areas, but they posed no harm to people, and the hotel staff was available to assist if necessary, so even those who are not fond of them can feel at ease.

<Service>
All staff members greeted and addressed the guests very well, giving the impression that they were well-trained.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Ocean, Guest Room, 2 Twin, Ocean View, Balcony

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.text:
While this hotel is not in the middle of Da Nang, I find the location of this hotel is good as it is about 20 mins to the middle of Da Nang (say Han market) and 30 mins to Hoi An (a must visit town). The biggest plus point for this hotel - the Marble Mountain is within walking distance (easily can spend 2-3 hours in the mountain exploring its Caves).

It has a clean beach and quite private. Nearby are all the luxury hotels also. The room is huge. While I occupied a garden view, it is actually dacing the pool and beyond it is the sea. Hence, it is also a sea view.

The breakfast spread is fantastic.  Staff is nice and help full.

Definitely will stay again if I visit Da Nang again.

reviews.title: Great experience!
reviews.text: This is my favorite hotel on this trip! Although it is the most expensive, I still think it's worth it. Traveling is all about enjoying! The hotel staff are very friendly, they serve coconut cookies in the afternoon, and in the evening, there are hotel-exclusive keychains and bookmarks in the lobby. Now, let's talk about the facilities: there are a total of four swimming pools inside, with very comfortable water temperatures. The children's pool is shallower, and many kids swim there. There is also a private beach nearby, allowing direct access to the sea. The hotel breakfast is extremely abundant, beyond ordinary description. I also ordered lunch, which is freshly made and very tasty! In addition, the children's club is also a highlight. It is spacious, has plenty of toys, and there are dedicated staff to supervise. I hope to come again next time!

reviews.title: Don't think I will stay here again
reviews.positives: The hotel grounds are large and beautiful, and the restaurant is good overall. In-room dining was a pleasant surprise, and the proximity to the Marble Mountains was convenient
reviews.negatives:
1 Extremely poor sound insulation. We were on the fourth floor. You could hear people walking upstairs or talking in the corridor way too clearly. I called reception at night asking them to quiet the neighbors above, but instead of just calling them, they started interrogating me: “Are you sure it’s coming from above? How many people do you think are there? So you’re saying you can’t sleep?” and so on. Very frustrating.
2 Right after check-in, I put up the “Do Not Disturb” sign so we could get the child to sleep immediately. It was completely ignored by the staff member who brought our luggage. I don’t blame him personally — I could hear him call the concierge first, and it was the concierge who gave the green light to ring the doorbell anyway, which woke the child up.
3 I would strongly recommend replacing whoever is in charge of room cleaning 'department'. Upon arrival, I found a couple of watermelon seeds in the corner of the bathroom floor. After every cleaning, there were clumps of hair mixed with dust left on the floor — it looked like they were falling off the broom. Under the beds was dirty — definitely not Marriott standard. The bases of the wall lights next to the bathroom mirror were never dusted, and the mirror itself had streaks.

reviews.title: I really like it^^
reviews.text: After staying at a hotel in Da Nang city for 2 nights during my 4-night trip, I chose to spend the remaining 2 nights at the Marriott resort. I think it was an excellent choice. I have such wonderful memories from my stay at the Marriott in Phuket's Khao Lak Beach, so I sought it out just by name, and it didn't disappoint. The cool lobby and the beautiful main pool visible from there were lovely, and above all, the service from the staff was outstanding. They cleaned the room twice a day and even delivered snacks to our room in between. There were no restaurants nearby, so we had dinner at the resort's restaurant, which was reasonably priced and satisfying in both taste and atmosphere. After breakfast, we visited the Marble Mountains, which were conveniently within walking distance. I signed up for a coffee class at noon, and it was just me and my companion, so I felt a bit shy, but it was a great opportunity to make and enjoy delicious Vietnamese coffee. Thank you to the coffee class teacher! Since there are no other facilities outside the resort, I think it would be nice if there were entertainment facilities like a ping pong table or pool table within the resort. If I go to Da Nang again, I will definitely return to the Marriott~~♡♡

reviews.title: Definitely a perfect place for a relaxing, slow-paced, delicious, and beautiful vacation.
reviews.positives:
Danang Marriott Resort & Spa is definitely a great choice for those who value swimming pools and beautiful scenery. Looking at photos of overcrowded beaches now, I feel relieved that I chose the Marriott. The beach here was quiet, making it possible to take peaceful walks and beautiful photos without crowds.
There are many swimming pools throughout the resort, and they never felt overcrowded. Early in the morning and in the evening after sunset, it was even possible to swim completely alone.
The breakfast buffet offered a huge variety of dishes — fruits, vegetables, pastries, drinks, and many other options. Everything was delicious, fresh, and very clean.
The service was extremely polite and welcoming. The staff speak English, Russian, and Korean, and they respond to requests very quickly.
This location is perfect for people who want to relax in peace and quiet, take beautiful photos for social media, enjoy slow walks along the beach, and spend time swimming in the pools.
reviews.negatives: To be honest, the rooms do show that the hotel is not new anymore. It would definitely be nice to see some renovation and updates to the rooms. The ceiling fan was shaking so much that we were actually worried it might fall down. There are also some issues with dust cleaning. The floor was clean, but there was noticeable dust on other surfaces, which unfortunately reduced the overall positive impression.

reviews.title: AMAZING BEACH RESORT
reviews.text: We booked the Tropical Glam package and was upgraded to a room with Ocean View, plus 1 hour of massage that was so good I fell asleep and snored. Only downside was there was a big event of Intel, so the place was packed and busy, plus they put up a stage that kindly blocked the view. The rest I can't complain, had an amazing time there.
reviews.response:
Dear VU,
Thank you so much for staying and leave us a review.
On behalf of the brilliant team, we would like to thank you once again for choosing our resort to stay and we really appreciate your comment for us as well. 
Your comment regarding inconvenience due to crowding and the obstruction of vision have been shared with our management board for further improvement. 
We hope to welcome you back soon.
Thank you and best regards,
Danang Marriott Resort & Spa Team

reviews.title: Recommended but lower your expectations on Ocean View from the room
reviews.positives: Very comfy, very good breakfast,friendly staff.
reviews.negatives: The room we were given on our first night had an “ocean view” that was almost completely blocked—the view was almost completely covered by palm trees. It looked nothing like the photos shown on the hotel’s website. Fortunately, we were able to change rooms for the second night. However, the hotel really needs to update its website photos or adjust the room descriptions so guests aren’t misled by inaccurate information. The staff at the front desk was helpful in resolving the problem and there was a follow up email after we left even. Appreciated this.

reviews.title: Fantastic experience ever.
reviews.text: I'm not gonna lie, it was the most fantastic, lovely, cozy, impressive place I've ever been to. The view was incredible, well organized, clean, I couldn't find any dirty bugs like cockroaches or bad bugs except mosquitoes. The pool was well managed too. Breakfast had various kinds of foods and drinks; the coconut coffee was awesome. The gym wasn't that big but enough to work out. Also, every staff member was so nice and friendly, good at speaking English, so we could understand their explanations very well. Especially Mr. King, who had the nickname King Kong, the bellman; he was so nice to our family and even gave us a little tour of the resort. He was so kind. Also, Rachel at the concierge was kind and lovely too. Everything about this resort was so nice. I'll definitely come back later. Thank you.

reviews.title: Beautiful beachfront oasis
reviews.positives: Beautiful grounds, ocean view from rooms, tasteful and comfortable room, buffet breakfast. I had an issue with the toilet in my room and when I returned for the day it was fixed and a beautiful vase of Lillie’s were placed in my room.
reviews.negatives: Staff at the front door assisting guests with transportation were very unfriendly.  Also, the hotel wasn’t walking distance to any shops or restaurants but Grabs are cheap and convenient.

reviews.title: Marriott is the best choice.
reviews.text: Although it wasn't very close to downtown Da Nang, I actually liked that aspect. We could enjoy the beach right in front of the resort very privately, and it was quiet and peaceful, making the scenery beautiful. The staff even came out to ensure safety when we wanted to swim in the sea. All the staff were really friendly and took care of every detail. The room was spacious, and it was always cool as the air conditioning was on when we arrived. The sea view from the room was fantastic, and the breakfast was delicious. We could walk to the Marble Mountains from the accommodation, and the local restaurants nearby were really tasty. I think choosing the Marriott was the best decision.

reviews.title: Exceptional!
reviews.text:
One of our favourite place to stay and relax in Da Nang! 

Superb staff! Very accommodating and polite! 
Breakfast is really good and a lot of choices! Barista made coffee is a plus! Soo good! 
Swimming pool is one of the best! And of course the private beach! 

Amazing place to be with your partner or family. Highly recommended!
